text:
Hello!
On page: 
https://www.freebsd.org/commercial/consult.html

My company is listed. 

---
 Raditex AB
    Raditex AB are a firm of consultants and also do education in Unix. We have long experience with all kinds of Unix systems not only FreeBSD or Linux. For more information phone us at +46 19 4501015 or give us an email at gorhas@raditex.nu or visit our web site. 
---

Please change phone number to: +46 19 450105

Cordially yours,
Göran Hasse
